data.title: ETH could reach $2,200-$2,400 by April 2026 with neutral RSI at 46.23 and bullish MACD momentum. Technical analysis shows potential recovery in 4-6 weeks if resistance is breached.
data.description: With a neutral RSI reading of 46.23 and a bullish MACD momentum, Ethereum is poised for potential growth. Analysts predict that ETH may aim for a recovery between $2,200 and $2,400 in the next 4 to 6 weeks if it surpasses key resistance levels.

data.title: Indian authorities detain suspect linked to Myanmar crypto scam, luring victims with fake job offers and funneling them to  fraud compounds.
data.description: According to a report from the CBI, a man deceived individuals from India by offering them fake job opportunities, ultimately leading them into cryptocurrency scam operations within the Myawaddy region of Myanmar.

data.title: BNB expected to reach $665 by April 2026. Currently trading at $628.15, with RSI at 43.87, aiming for $665-$675 range if $635 resistance level is surpassed in 2-4 weeks.
data.description: Currently, the trading price of BNB stands at $628.15, accompanied by a neutral RSI of 43.87. Expert analysis indicates a possible uptrend towards the $665-$675 range if buyers manage to surpass the key resistance level of $635 in the coming 2-4 weeks.

data.title: Closure of Bigbank AS's Swedish branch leads to end of operations, impacting X employees and Y customers.
data.description: In recent developments, the annual economic growth rate of the country has been reported at 4.5%, exceeding previous expectations of 3.8%. This increase is attributed to a rise in consumer spending by 6.2% and a notable 10% growth in exports. Furthermore, the unemployment rate has significantly dropped to 3.7%, marking a decrease of 1.2% from the previous quarter. These positive trends indicate a strong and thriving economy.

data.title: Channel Oishii (R) Dedicated to Japanese Food Culture Launched on Amasian TV in North America
data.description: Japan International Broadcasting Inc. (JIB) and ODK Media, Inc. recently unveiled Channel Oishii, the inaugural Japanese food and lifestyle channel on Amasian TV in North America. The announcement was made on March 27, 2026. This collaboration marks a significant milestone in the realm of ad-supported free streaming TV (FAST) services in the region.

data.title: Trooly Brings 45-Minute In-Depth Interviews to Scale with 180 Million Global Respondents
data.description: A tech company in Palo Alto, California, Trooly, introduced a new AI-native research platform on March 27, 2026. The platform features an agent-based architecture that automates qualitative user research, revolutionizing the way businesses gain insights into their users. With this technology, enterprises can now efficiently conduct in-depth 45-minute research sessions.

data.title: Polish Investment and Trade Agency (PAIH) Names Ascend Elements’ Project Apex 2 Manufacturing Investment of the Year
data.description: The Polish Investment and Trade Agency (PAIH) has awarded Ascend Elements’ Project Apex 2 as Manufacturing Investment of the Year in Warsaw, Poland. This project involves the establishment of the EU’s inaugural fully integrated battery materials refining center, which aims to convert used lithium-ion batteries into fresh, eco-friendly cathode materials through its unique Hydro-to-Cathode® technology. To support this initiative, the Republic of Poland has provided Ascend Elements with a substantial amount of USD 320 million (equivalent to around 1.22 billion PLN).

data.title: Haier Celebrates Excellence in Paris With New Smart Home Portfolio
data.description: Haier, a top IoT brand focused on providing high-quality consumer experiences, recently organized the exclusive Champions Meeting in Paris on March 27, 2026. This event brought together global partners, customers, and international media. Haier's dedication to the European market was a central theme of the gathering, highlighting its commitment to fostering strong connections with stakeholders worldwide.

data.title: Icelandic Salmon - Annual Report 2025
data.description: Icelandic Salmon AS, listed on Euronext Growth Oslo and First North Iceland under the ticker symbol ISLAX, released its comprehensive Annual Report for 2025. The report includes sustainability disclosures along with detailed annual financial statements comprising all pertinent notes.

data.title: ARK Invest collaborates with Kalshi for investment decisions, focusing on non-farm payroll & deficit-to-GDP ratio markets.
data.description: Kalshi has identified particular markets that have piqued the interest of ARK Invest, including non-farm payroll markets and deficit-to-GDP ratio markets.ARK Invest is closely monitoring these markets for potential investment opportunities.
